LAW AND MOTION, 302 DEFENDANT JESSE FIERRO'S DEMURRER TO PLAINTIFF HUNTER LABORATORIES, INC.'S FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING - DEMURRER SUSTAINED WITH 10 DAYS LEAVE TO AMEND AS TO 1ST AND 3RD CAUSES OF ACTION. PLAINTIFF MUST ALLEGE FACTS REGARDING CAUSATION OF ACTUAL DAMAGE TO SUPPORT 1ST CAUSE OF ACTION. AS TO 3RD CAUSE OF ACTION PLAINTIFF MUST PLEAD FRAUD WITH REQUISITE PARTICULARITY AND DAMAGES. SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND AS TO 2ND CAUSE OF ACTION (UCL), NO OPPOSITION. (PREVAILING PARTY/DEFENDANT TO PREPARE ORDER.) JUDGE: CHARLOTTE WALTER WOOLARD, REPORTER: KENT GUBBINE, CSR #5797

LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT JESSE FIERRO'S DEMURRER TO PLAINTIFF HUNTER LABORATORIES, INC.'S SECOND AMENDED COMPLAINT IS SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND AS TO THE 1ST CAUSE OF ACTION REFERENCE TO ANY ALLEGED BREACH OF CONTRACT BASED ON USE OF PLAINTIFF'S CONFIDENTIAL INFORMATION. DEMURRER TO 1ST CAUSE OF ACTION ON OTHER GROUNDS OVERRULED. DEFENDANT'S DEMURRER TO 2ND CAUSE OF ACTION IS SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND AS TO FRAUD ALLEGATIONS SET FORTH AT PARAGRAPHS 27-29 OF THE SECOND AMENDED COMPLAINT. THE DEMURRER IS OVERRULED ON ALL OTHER GROUNDS. IN ADDITION, THE COURT INDICATED THAT DEFENDANT'S ANSWER IS TO BE FILED WITHIN 5 DAYS FROM NOTICE OF ENTRY OF ORDER. (MOVING PARTY TO PREPARE A PROPOSED FORM OF ORDER.) JUDGE: LORETTA M. GIORGI, REPORTER: KARLA ELLIS-DAVIS, CSR #12998

DEMURRER TO 2ND AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Feb-10-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
DEFENDANT JESSE FIERRO'S DEMURRER TO PLAINTIFF HUNTER LABORATORIES, INC.'S SECOND AMENDED COMPLAINT.

RULING: No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling - DEFENDANT'S DEMURRER IS SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND AS TO THE 1ST CAUSE OF ACTION REFERENCE TO ANY ALLEGED BREACH OF CONTRACT BASEd ON USE OF PLAINTIFF'S CONFIDENTIAL INFORMATION. DEMURRER TO 1ST CAUSE OF ACTION ON OTHER GROUNDS OVERRULED. DEFENDANT'S DEMURRER TO 2ND CAUSE OF ACTION IS SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND AS TO FRAUD ALLEGATIONS SET FORTH AT PARAGRAPHS 27-29 OF THE SECOND AMENDED COMPLAINT. THE DEMURRER IS OVERRULED ON ALL OTHER GROUNDS. In addition, the Court indicated that defendant's answer is to be filed within 5 days from notice of entry of order. (Moving party to prepare a proposed form of order.) (302/LMG) Judge: Loretta M. Giorgi, Reporter: Karla Ellis-Davis, CSR #12998
